## Meeting Purpose

### Blog Pruning Exercise

  - [Jacob initiated pruning process using GSC data](https://fathom.video/share/28a_Rg53eEa7KsyBzfFz3m14zKkb7Fjt?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

  - [Goals: cut irrelevant content, merge related articles, improve overall site performance](https://fathom.video/share/28a_Rg53eEa7KsyBzfFz3m14zKkb7Fjt?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Similar exercise at ActiveCampaign resulted in 20% blog traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/28a_Rg53eEa7KsyBzfFz3m14zKkb7Fjt?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

  - [Significant click drop observed in GSC data (≈30% decline)](https://fathom.video/share/28a_Rg53eEa7KsyBzfFz3m14zKkb7Fjt?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
